description.en: Ontology for European Medical Devices and In Vitro Diagnostics (MDR/IVDR).

comments.en: Ontology for European Medical Devices and In Vitro Diagnostics (MDR/IVDR).

bibliographicCitation.value: Bańó Richart, M. (2026). CEDMAR Medical Device Ontology. Version 1.0.

comment.en: Led to death or serious injury.
Risk derived from the data inference processes in medical software.
Risk from biological, chemical, or particulate impurities.
Defect in manufacturing or performance degradation.
Relates a risk class to the device assigned to it.
Inferred property linking device to risk.
Inferred property linking action to device.
Relates a medical device to its manufacturer.
Regions or countries affected by a corrective action.
Relates a manufacturer to the device it produces.
Relates a device to the incident it is involved in.
Relates a corrective action (FSCA) to the incident it resolves.
Relates a device to the corrective action affecting it.
Relates a manufacturer to its geographical country.
Commercial or trade name of the medical device.
Relates an incident to the corrective action that resolves it.
Relates a risk to the device exposed to it.
Inferred property linking device to country.
Relates a risk to the incident it caused.
Relates an incident to the specific IMDRF risk that caused it.
Relates a device to its regulatory risk class.
Relates an incident to the medical device involved.
Relates a country to the manufacturer located there.
Relates a country to the device manufactured there.
